name: Open Impetus Turn
preceding_figure_names: Curved Feather to Back Feather, Natural Turn, Natural Twist Turn, Reverse Wave
following_figure_names: Feather Step, Weave from PP, Natural Weave (Natural Weave from PP), Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Curved Feather to Back Feather (starting in PP)
notes: Maintain the sway from previous figure as you lower through CBM, keep the diagonal stretch. Do not lift the toe off the floor. The ball of the foot needs to stay skimming the floor. Do not turn too early, swing left side up (do not drop left shoulder, to be light on Man), stay behind Man. Allow feet to turn. Pull center back. Let head finish the action at the very last. Head turn slowly. Finish with body slightly ahead of Lady.

comments: Maintain the sway from previous figure as you lower through CBM, keep the diagonal stretch.
Do not lift the toe off the floor. The ball of the foot needs to stay skimming the floor.
Q: RF closes to LF (Heel Turn) | FDC | HT | 3/8 btwn 1-2 | Sway(L) | rise e/o 2

steps.action: Diag. fwd in PP, L side leading
comments: Finish with body slightly ahead of Lady.
Do not turn too early, swing left side up (do not drop left shoulder, to be light on Man), stay behind Man.
Allow feet to turn. Pull center back.

steps.action: To side in PP having brushed to LF
comments: Let head finish the action at the very last. Head turn slowly.

steps.action: Fwd and across in PP and CBMP
